name: Royal Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals
summary: Independent charity and federation providing animal care, protection services, policy work and welfare guidance.
description: Important for welfare evidence, policy positions, cruelty prevention, public education and source-backed campaign claims.
alignment: Listed because RSPCA welfare guidance and public policy work are relevant to Bite Back's evidence standards.
